name: civil_infrastructure_whistleblower_cedar_ind_col
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Civil Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around civil infrastructure whistleblower cedar ind col has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as individual against collective; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Zara Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Zara Ishikawa, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Civil Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Patel
agents.identity: I am Marco Patel, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Civil Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect collective.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Zara Ishikawa must choose under individual versus collective. What does Zara Ishikawa do?
